sections.paragraph:
verb לפחות

to lessen, be diminished, reduced

verb לפחת

to lessen, decrease; depreciate, devalue

verb פוחת

be devalued

verb להפחית

to reduce, decrease, subtract (math.)

verb הופחת

be reduced, decreased, subtracted (math.)

verb לפחת ( >>פיחת)

to lessen, decrease; depreciate, devalue

masculine noun

depreciation, amortization, amortisation, amortizement; waste, wastage

masculine and feminine noun

pit; trap
